title: Pre-arranged or prepaid cremation services
doc_html:
§885.  Prearranged or prepaid cremation services

Any prearranged or prepaid cremation services shall be sold or distributed in accordance with the provisions of R.S. 37:861.

Acts 2003, No. 1243, §2.
